reason.message: Running with Burst compilation (USE_RUST_BACKEND not defined). Burst performance tests are active. To test Rust performance, add USE_RUST_BACKEND to Project Settings → Player → Scripting Define Symbols (ProjectSettings/ProjectSettings.asset)

test-case.output: Performance Test Results: Setup: 19ms (100 meshes, 100,000 vertices) String Building: 435ms (4.4ms per mesh) File Writing: 59ms Total Export: 494ms File size: 13577KB
